# Helms
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Helms&prop=wikitext

Helms are used by Warriors to give themselves and others buffs

There are various Helms Exclusive to RotF, these are:
* [https://rotfserver.wikia.com/wiki/Helm_of_Oryx?venotify=created Helm of Oryx]
* [[Helm of the Fallen]]
* [[Helm of the Demon Lord]]
* [[Shadowscale's Skull]]
* [[Galactic Titan Helm]]
